subphases.name: Fresh Review Data And Ops Hardening
Proof Runner Isolation And Waiting-Window Runbook

commandGates.command: bun run --filter @beep/duckdb check && bun run --filter @beep/duckdb test
cd packages/tooling/library/ai-metrics && bun run check && bun run test && bun run lint && bun run docgen
cd packages/tooling/tool/cli && bun run check && bun run test && bun run lint

bun run beep ai-metrics forwarder timer --target dankserver --data-root .beep/ai-metrics --hash-salt-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/hash-salt' --raw-archive-key-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/raw-archive-key' --json

cd /home/elpresidank/YeeBois/projects/beep-effect-worktrees/ai-metrics-p6-proof && bun run beep ai-metrics forwarder timer --target dankserver --repo-root /home/elpresidank/YeeBois/projects/beep-effect-worktrees/ai-metrics-p6-proof --data-root /home/elpresidank/YeeBois/projects/beep-effect/.beep/ai-metrics --hash-salt-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/hash-salt' --raw-archive-key-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/raw-archive-key' --otlp-base-url 'https://dankserver.tailc7c348.ts.net:8447' --interval-minutes 15 --max-file-bytes 8388608 --max-files 5 --json

BEEP_AI_METRICS_RAW_ARCHIVE_KEY="$(op read 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/raw-archive-key')" bun run beep ai-metrics archive drill --target dankserver --data-root .beep/ai-metrics --hash-salt-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/hash-salt' --raw-archive-key-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/raw-archive-key' --json
cd infra && bun run check && bun run test && bun run lint

bun run beep ai-metrics report weekly --target dankserver --data-root .beep/ai-metrics --hash-salt-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/hash-salt' --raw-archive-key-secret-ref 'op://TBK/ai-metrics/raw-archive-key' --json
